question: How many free night's stays can I redeem at any Hilton property with my accumulated points?

retrieval_results.context:
User has enough Hilton Honors points for two free nights at any Hilton property
User may use Hilton points for a separate trip to Las Vegas
Hilton Paris Eiffel Tower requires 50,000-60,000 Hilton Honors points per night (Category 7)
User will redeem points for a weekend getaway at Hilton Lake Las Vegas Resort.
